title: Alerts
subtitle: Create rules that trigger notifications when an event happens on a work order. Each rule defines who is notified, over which channel, with which message.

empty.title: No alert rule
empty.description: Create your first rule to receive automatic notifications on your work-order events.

validation.required: Name, template and at least one channel are required.
validation.clientTemplateRequired: A client template is required when the "Client" checkbox is on.

edit.filtersHint: Leaving a section unchecked means no filter on that criterion. Multiple boxes checked = OR.
edit.priorityHint: Restricts to work orders matching one of these priorities. Unchecked = any priority.
edit.taskTypesEmpty: No task type configured — see Settings.
edit.templatesEmpty: No form template configured — see Settings.
edit.clientTypesEmpty: No client type configured — see Settings.
edit.addressTypesEmpty: No location type configured — see Settings.
edit.clientTemplateHint: External-facing version — do NOT expose internal ids or technical statuses.
edit.clientBodyPlaceholder: Hello {{client.name}}, your service request has been handled.
